parameters.query:
SELECT l.id, l.nome, l.telefone, l.email, l.fase_cobranca, l.dias_atraso, l.valor_em_aberto, l.status, u.id as ultimo_contato_id, u.timestamp as ultimo_contato_em FROM leads l LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (lead_id) lead_id, id, timestamp
  FROM mensagens
  ORDER BY lead_id, timestamp DESC
) u ON u.lead_id = l.id WHERE l.status NOT IN ('pago', 'cancelado', 'arquivado') ORDER BY l.dias_atraso DESC
